data.title: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG) stock fell after reporting Q4 and full-year 2025 results with 4% gain in last 6 months.
data.description: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ISRG) saw a decline in stock value following the release of its preliminary fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results. The company noted an increase in procedures, system placements, and revenue for both periods. ISRG stock has experienced a 4% growth over the past 6 months, as reported by Benzinga Pro. Investors looking to tap into this stock can consider iShares U.S. Medical Devices ETF (NYSE: IHI). Global procedures utilizing da Vinci and Ion systems rose by approximately 18% in the fourth quarter. More details on this news piece can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: P&G advises rejecting mini-tender offer from Potemkin Limited for up to 50,000 shares at $100 each, 31% discount.
data.description: In Cincinnati, The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) disclosed receiving notice of an unsolicited "mini-tender" bid from Potemkin Limited to acquire up to 50,000 shares (with a possibility to purchase more as stated) of the Company's common stock at $100.00 per share. The offer price of $100.00 per share signifies a roughly 31 percent reduction compared to the closing rate of $145.52 on December 18, 2025, the preceding trading day.

data.title: Introducing Bilt Card 2.0: Offers rewards on rent, mortgage, and purchases. Includes 3 credit cards with 10.00% introductory APR for 12 months.
data.description: In New York, Bilt has introduced the Bilt Card 2.0, consisting of three credit cards that now provide rewards for homeowners, allowing them to earn points on mortgage payments. New cardholders can benefit from a 10.00% introductory APR† on new eligible purchases for 12 months across the three cards, subject to terms and credit approval. The company has previously highlighted the rewarding nature of rent payments, which is now being expanded to include mortgage payments in their latest offering.

data.title: EKINOPS reported €105 million in revenue for 2025 with an Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) of €15.8 million as of December 31, 2025.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, EKINOPS, a prominent provider of optical transport, branch routing, and cybersecurity SASE solutions for telecom operators and businesses, disclosed its consolidated revenue for the fiscal year 2025, concluding on December 31.

data.title: Rexel reports total shares and voting rights as of December 31, 2025 per French Commercial Code and AMF rules.
data.description: Rexel has released a statement regarding the aggregation of shares and voting rights in compliance with Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the General Rules of the French Autorité des marchés financiers. This disclosure pertains to the total number of shares and voting rights held by the company as stipulated by regulatory requirements. It ensures transparency and accountability in relation to ownership and decision-making within Rexel.

data.title: Progress report on liquidity contract: status update as of Dec 31, 2025, with details of implementation so far.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global COVID-19 cases have surpassed 200 million, with the death toll reaching over 4.2 million. The United States remains the country with the highest number of infections, exceeding 35 million cases, followed by India with over 31 million cases. Furthermore, China has administered over 1.6 billion vaccine doses, aiming to vaccinate its entire population. Despite vaccination efforts, the virus continues to spread, prompting health officials to urge the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing.

data.title: Galt's DNTL Hub named 2026 Top Patient Rated Dentist by Find Local Doctors, offering general dentistry and implants.
data.description: The primary Galt location has established itself as a reputable choice for families across Sacramento County and the Central Valley, providing a wide range of general dentistry services and cutting-edge implant options in a contemporary, patient-centric setting. Situated in Galt, California, as of January 14, 2026, this practice has garnered the trust and loyalty of numerous families as they expand their services within the region.

data.title: Revelyst's Project Freedom brands to showcase at 2026 SHOT Show, featuring Blackhawk, Eagle Industries, CamelBak, and Stone Glacier.
data.description: Chesapeake, Virginia - Revelyst's portfolio of brands, including Blackhawk, Eagle Industries, CamelBak, and Stone Glacier, will be jointly showcased at the upcoming SHOT Show in Las Vegas. The event serves as a platform for industry leaders to display their products and innovations, with this collaboration aimed at maximizing visibility and engagement. The presence of these renowned brands is expected to attract significant attention, potentially resulting in new partnerships and increased recognition within the industry.
